title: angelica nubigena
intro: Angelica nubigena, also known as Himalayan angelica, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica nubigena include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestion. Angelica nubigena can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being.
